nodes.body: { 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Tony Wojnar_ continues the epic creation of Dribble 2 by adding [platforms dependent on color](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mkuy6xniek27), a [mini maze](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mlghyn4ajk2b), [aggressive crayons](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mmjpkakpi22a), and [collectables](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mn32jl6rgc2z)!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _James C. Kane_ showed off STARSPEED's [procedural spaceship generator](https://x.com/jamesckane/status/2050331344404709644), and will be [speaking at SIGGRAPH](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/james-c-kane_3dgs-in-web-gaming-the-shadow-of-the-czar-share-7460377519490256896-brCi/) about 3DGS in Web Gaming: ‘[The Shadow of the Czar](https://theshadowoftheczar.com/)‘!

{ 🎮 Game Demos } _SolidStateKC_ released a prototype of [Rail Shot](https://solidstatekc.itch.io/railshot-proto), a precision arcade game where a single launch sets a coin rolling through a mechanical scoring board, and every run is a chance at the perfect line.

{ 🎮 Game Releases } _Philocypher_ released [Primordio](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4385580/Primordio/) on Steam, a game where you control a wisp of pure energy in this roguelite bullet-hell survival game.
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Hutchkey Games_ is making progress on [Send It!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kBX1dUCHDSQ) - play as a mailbox sending a letter in this high-pace top-down platformer!

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Lazarus D. Richardson_ created the music for [Operation Alien Translation](https://sheepolution.itch.io/operation-alien-translation) as part of the Ludum Dare Jam. They placed 13th overall, 3rd in graphics, 4th in humor, and 30th in audio! [Check out the soundtrack here](https://lazarusrichardson.bandcamp.com/album/operation-alien-translation)!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Weird Mage_ has been working on [Chrono Cards](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4402530/Chrono_Cards/), a fast-paced, multiplayer competitive card game where you have the power to bend time itself! It was featured on Steam in the "Upcoming" section of the Deckbuilder Fest!
{ 🎼 Music Releases } _Gabriel Vianello_ showcased [XYLO.dnb](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1KS8Y3_k80azVv7hKRlCA5cgo-J2-0n7x/view) at the Game Audio Club!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Ryan Swanson_ showcased their upcoming game [Mini Raid Leaders](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4484690/Mini_Raid_Leader/), a single-player Action RTS in which you command an ever-growing party of heroes to take down powerful bosses.
{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Luke Puchard_ released a demo of [Cthonet](https://lupuchard.itch.io/cthonet), a game about networks and assembly programming, with rats.

{ 🎮 Game Demos } _Vadeum_ released a demo of [Legendum](https://vadeum.itch.io/legendum), an incremental / idle RPG where you live many lives in a fantasy world, aging from youth to elder. Your deeds shape the world your next life inherits. Spare a goblin in one life, meet them as a trader in the next.
{ 🎮 Game Releases } _Wonderpond_ released [Gelli Fields](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1965980/Gelli_Fields/), a casual farming game with little slimes. Relax, Collect, & Discover!

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Dustin Triplett_ released [Kittens Against Kapitalism](https://dustintriplett.itch.io/kittens-against-kapitalism) for the Fuck Capitalism 2026 Game Jam! This game follows a radicalized kitty who sets off on a journey after being abruptly fired.

{ 🎮 Game Releases } _Axol Studio_ released [Bring It On! v1.1](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2020460/Bring_It_On/), with tons of Quality of Life improvements, bug fixes, and performance updates! Additionally, the [soundtrack is now available on Bandcamp](https://axolstudio.bandcamp.com/album/bring-it-on-original-soundtrack)!

{ 📰 News } The Chicago Indie Games Showcase (CIGs) is [looking for submissions](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc62lIxneJoeKI74k6zxd0xXflh9TC8fAw4lJRcEqHkNnZHFQ/viewform), and has a couple of days left on their successful [Kickstarter](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/indiecitygames/cigs-chicago-indie-game-showcase-2026)!
{ 📚 Resources } The VFX Campus is closing. As a thank you to their community, [every course](https://thevfxschool.com/) is now available at no cost.

{ 🎮 Game Releases } [Rubber Ducky Rampage](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/rdr/rubber-ducky-rampage-the-battle-for-the-tub-begins) by _Mike Breault_ is a board game that’s fun for all ages! You can order it now on Kickstarter before it hits game store shelves.

{!header} May’s warmth sparked a surge of creativity in the community, yielding a bounty of projects on Steam and beyond!
Don’t miss out on the fun! [Join us for events coming up in June!](https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/)

events.title: June GameDev Social!
events.description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE. This is an all ages event, but minors must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. 

This month we have a special chance to paint a miniature version of the STLGamedev alien Terrence (the yellow one)! No painting experience required, just come hang out, get creative, and connect with other local devs.

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/312692355
events.location: Dirty 20 Bar - 14051 Manchester Rd - Ballwin, MO, us

events.title: June Game Audio Club: Project Share
events.description:
If you’re into making video game music or sound design (or just curious) come hang out with us once a month! Doesn’t matter if you’re a pro or just starting out— everyone’s welcome. Just bring your love for game audio. Chill time where you can share your work, get feedback, or just vibe with people who love game audio. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314944097
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family Branch, 1640 S Lindbergh Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63131, USA

events.title: Game Club: The Aquatic Adventure of the Last Human
events.description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design. Our game for this month is... The Aquatic Adventure of the Last Human

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314944290
events.location: Sauce on the Side, 701 N New Ballas Rd, Creve Coeur, MO 63141, USA

events.title: June Gamedev Work Night
events.description:
St. Louis County Library Clark Family branch is hosting casual work time for local game developers in the Creative Lab. Bring your project to work on and talk with other devs for feedback or fun. This is open to EVERYONE ages 14 and up. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313935659
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us

events.title: July GameDev Social!
events.description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE. This is an all ages event, but minors must be accompanied by a parent or guardian. This is mainly a social event, but feel free to bring your sketchbook, tablet, laptop, or card/board game prototype to show off whatever you're working on!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313699544
events.location: Dirty 20 Bar - 14051 Manchester Rd - Ballwin, MO, us

events.title: MO Game Con
events.description:
STLGameDev will have a table. Stop by and say hi! 

Missouri Game Convention (MoGameCon) is a convention celebrating all forms of games and unites the gaming community. Each year it features vendors of all types of games and gaming merchandise, games on free play, video game tournaments, and a cosplay contest.

More information and tickets are available on the MoGameCon website!
events.location: Greensfelder Recreation Complex, 550 Weidman Rd, Manchester, MO 63011, USA

events.title: Share & Play: Game Playtesting!
events.description:
Join us for casual game playtesting! This is an opportunity for developers to share their progress, observe playtesting, and get feedback on their projects, and for local game enthusiasts to get their hands on new games, prototypes, and give helpful feedback. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314944378
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us
